name: Heart of the Ancients
description: An Eridian E-tech relic that combines a weapon-type damage bonus with Tenacity-style Fight For Your Life support. It is a strong hybrid choice for builds that want more damage without giving up all of their downed-state utility.

special.description: Grants a damage boost for one weapon category and also adds Tenacity-style bonuses, increasing Fight For Your Life duration and sometimes the health restored on Second Wind.

notes:
It drops from Legendary Loot Midgets.

In practice, it combines the core effects of Aggression Relics and Tenacity Relics into a single item.
abilities: Improves weapon damage and second wind capability. SOOIDIGIOIGI2
